justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's temporal requests throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability and then asked the user to pick a new day without offering any alternatives, which led to a very long conversation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple avoidable round-trips by only checking one day at a time, even when it was clear that there were no available slots for several consecutive days.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation was frustrating due to the agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative dates, leading to a tedious back-and-forth for the user.
